uplink.description: standard report, temperature cluster 0x0402 -> air.temperature (29.53 C)
standard report, temperature cluster 0x0402 -> air.temperature (21.50 C)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report (centi-deg 0x0866=2150). expected.data confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (normalisation_standard) -> temperature 21.5.
Synthetic in-bounds standard report (centi-% 0x157C=5500). expected.data confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js -> humidity 55.

uplink.description: standard report, pressure cluster 0x0403 -> air.pressure (1013 hPa)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report (s16 0x03F5=1013 hPa, within atmospheric 900-1100). expected.data confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js -> pressure 1013.

uplink.description: standard report, power cluster 0x0050 attr 6 disposable battery -> battery (3.621 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic power-source report: flags byte 0x04 (disposable battery) then 2-byte mV 0x0E25=3621 -> 3.621 V. Upstream normalisation_standard crashes on the power-cluster alarm path (multistate attribute lookup); the volts extraction is verified against the in-repo Watteco reference codec codecs/nke-watteco/atmo-sensor/codec.js (same byte layout) -> battery 3.621.

uplink.description: Huffman batch frame (byte0 bit0 clear) -> error, batch decoding out of scope
uplink._note: TTN example batch payload (byte0=0x36, bit0 clear). This codec decodes standard reports only and reports batch frames as an error.
